text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 14 

DOB_DT 

LABEL: Patient Date of Birth (DOB) 

DESCRIPTION: Date of birth of the patient as indicated on the event record. 

SHORT NAME: DOB_DT 

LONG NAME: DOB_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: Date formatted as CCYYMMDD 

COMMENT: It is possible that this date may be different than the beneficiary date of birth (BENE_BIRTH_DT) 
variable
